text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning, even on weekends. First, I drink a glass of water, then I do a short yoga session for about fifteen minutes. After a quick shower, I have breakfast, usually oatmeal with fruit. My work starts at 9:00 AM, and I take a short break for lunch at noon. I finish work at 5:00 PM. In the evening, I go for a 30-minute run in the park. After that, I cook dinner and relax by watching a show or reading a book. I try to go to bed by 10:30 PM. This routine keeps me healthy and productive.
